name: analog-attach
description: Device Tree Source (DTS/DTSO) editor with schema validation and binding support

commands.title: Analog Attach: Add Device Tree file to current overlay
Analog Attach: Compile current Device Tree file
Analog Attach: Deploy the current compiled Device Tree

analog-attach.defaultLinuxRepository.markdownDescription: Path to the Linux Repository to be used by default

analog-attach.defaultDtSchemaRepository.markdownDescription: Path to the dt-schema Repository to be used by default

analog-attach.enableAutoMergeDtsoBase.markdownDescription: Automatically merge a DTSO overlay with the last DTS base you selected for that file.

analog-attach.preprocessDtsFilesCommand.markdownDescription: Command used to call the preprocessor on a dts file that contains include directives.

analog-attach.compileDtsFileCommand.markdownDescription: Command used for compiling a valid dts file.

analog-attach.decompileDtbFileCommand.markdownDescription: Command used for decompiling a valid dtb file.

analog-attach.sshpassConfig.markdownDescription: Command used to upload on the target device

analog-attach.sshConfig.markdownDescription:
SSH command to connect to remote and execute a command on remote.

{command} will be replaced with rebootDevice command or writeDtbToOverlays command

analog-attach.remoteHost.markdownDescription: Remote host/IP used to derive sshConfig.

analog-attach.remoteUser.markdownDescription: Remote user used to derive sshConfig.

analog-attach.remotePassword.markdownDescription: Remote password used to derive sshpassConfig.

analog-attach.remoteSudoAuth.markdownDescription: Prefix used for sudo on remote. Leave empty if writeDtbToOverlays already contains sudo.

analog-attach.rebootDevice.markdownDescription: Command used to reboot the remote device after 5 seconds of sleep with sshpass and ssh

analog-attach.writeDtbToOverlays.markdownDescription: Command run on the remote host to consume the DTB from stdin and write it. {dtb_name} will be replaced with the filename (e.g. test-dt.txt or compiled dtb).

analog-attach.skipDeleteConfirmation.markdownDescription: When enabled, sensors and channels are deleted immediately without showing a confirmation dialog.

scripts.package: yarn run build:extension-protocol && yarn run build:attach-lib && yarn run build:hds-react && yarn run build:attach-ui-lib && yarn run build:pnp-webview && yarn run build:tree-editor-webview && yarn workspace @analog-attach/extension webpack --mode production --devtool hidden-source-map
scripts.pretest: yarn run compile-tests && yarn run build
scripts.test: yarn run compile-tests && yarn workspace @analog-attach/extension exec vscode-test && yarn workspace attach-lib test --run
scripts.test-clean: yarn run pretest && yarn workspace @analog-attach/extension exec vscode-test && yarn workspace attach-lib test --run
scripts.build:all: yarn run build:extension-protocol && yarn run build:attach-lib && yarn run build:hds-react && yarn run build:attach-ui-lib && yarn run build:pnp-webview && yarn run build:tree-editor-webview && yarn run build:extension
